mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, email, avatar, bio, gender, age, phone, role, points, login_token, login_time, security_question, security_answer, created_at, updated_at FROM user WHERE username = #{username}

SELECT id, username, password, email, avatar, bio, gender, age, phone, role, points, login_token, login_time, security_question, security_answer, created_at, updated_at FROM user WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT id, username, password, email, avatar, bio, gender, age, phone, role, points, login_token, login_time, security_question, security_answer, created_at, updated_at FROM user WHERE id = #{userId}
